reviews.title: Great location and great value for your money! Would stay here again!
reviews.positives:
The location of this hotel is excellent.  A 2-3 minute walk to the main bridge in Hoi An and the center of town. There is also a night market that happens every day on the street of the hotel (although we were never bothered by any noise) which makes you feel like you are in the thick of the city’s action.

The lady at the reception that greeted us and that helped us throughout our stay was absolutely delightful and spoke very good English.
reviews.negatives:
We ended up having two different reservations as we decided to arrive a day earlier than originally planned.  So although the hotel accommodated us with an extra night the room was a standard double room which was on the smaller side (but with a true queen sized bed large and comfortable enough for two adults) and the toilet bowl was literally in the shower area.  So once one person showered and made the floor wet the whole toilet got wet and was difficult to get to.

Our second night’s room was a deluxe twin bed room and it was much bigger and much nicer and with a “normal” bathroom. 😊

The breakfast buffet was a bit on the meager side if you don’t eat seafood.

reviews.title: Too noisy

reviews.title: Double edged sword location during rainy season
reviews.positives:
The staff is amazing very helpful and welcoming.
Provided itineraries and plans for us, also offered taxis with really good prices, to myson, danang and coconut village. Location is very good and close to everything but be carefull what you wish for, because we arrived just after the novemeber flooding, and being close to the river turned into source of stress leading up to our visit, everything was clean when we arrived but the impact of the flooding was still visible on the hotel's street  we know the risks of visiting during rainy season, but something to keep in mind.
reviews.negatives: The furniture can use an upgrade.

reviews.title: Hoianan
reviews.text: Convenient location near the night market and Hoi An Old Town. Staff was helpful in recommending places to eat and visit. As the hotel is located right in the middle of the night market, it can be pretty noisy if you are an early sleeper. The night market ends around 10 to 10.30pm. The tiled floor in the shower can be pretty slippery, so be careful. Minor inconvenience is that the shower area does not have a holder for you to put your own toiletries. The toiletries holder is only meant for the hotel provided bath toiletries. Some mosquitoes in the room as well.

reviews.title: Good Location. Walking distance to everything around.
reviews.positives: Good Location. Night Market just outside the street. Walkable distance to the Lake & many Restaurants/Bars within the area.
reviews.negatives: A/C needs to be upgraded to higher capacity. Ac/c Does not cool enough.

reviews.title: Noisy Environment
reviews.text:
The room is not sound proof.  Could hardly sleep until past mid-night due to its close proximity to the night activity occurring in front of the hotel..a night market.
The furniture in the room needs replacing as chips n cracks can been seen.  Water pipes in the bathroom are leaking too. 
Breakfast items are standard where coffee is only luke warm at best.
Only great asset this hotel has is staff who are awesome in their role.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The location is perfect, with the Cantonese Assembly Hall just a 5-minute walk away.

The breakfast has a limited variety, but it’s enough for me. They offer bread and butter, coffee and milk, juice, fried rice, traditional Vietnamese food such as fried rolls, fresh vegetables (lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers), and cut fruit like pineapple, dragon fruit, and melon.

The staff are very friendly. I requested help arranging a private car pickup from Hue City, and they assisted me right away. The front desk staff always greet guests with a smile, the security guard is very kind, and they even prepared sweet cookies for guests staying over the New Year.
reviews.negatives: It’s located inside the night market, so it gets very crowded at night and may take longer to get back to the hotel if you stay out late.

reviews.title: Convenient Location but Too Noisy at Night
reviews.text:
The room was spacious and clean, which made for a comfortable stay. However, the hotel is located right next to the night market, and it was extremely noisy until about 1am. Workers dismantling the stalls were talking loudly, and the thin walls did little to block the noise.

Breakfast was quite basic with limited variety and felt rather rustic, with not many options to choose from.

reviews.title: Comfortably stay, excellent breakfast and supporting staff
reviews.text: Had booked delux tripple room for a family of 4 (2 adults, 2 kids below 12yrs). The booking sites (eg Agoda) was showing that the room can accommodate only 3 guests. On contacting the hotel, they allowed 4 guests at a small surcharge. The beds were big enough for the 4 of us. The hotel is located on a walking street (no vehicles allowed in the evening) which has an evening market daily on the road (roads are cleared by 11pm so no noise issue). Attached Balcony to our room on the first floor was useless in the evening because of lack of privacy. More importantly check in/out with luggage is a problem in the evening. You may have to walk 100 to 200m depending on where your ride drops you.  On the plus side, you enter the market with a single step outside you hotel and walkable to lantern street. Mrs My Nhung was very helpful throughout the booking process and our stay. She also helped in arranging Ba Na Hills trip at a competitive price. Rooms are spacious, hotel has lift, breakfast was awesome - fruits, cold cuts, bakery items, mouth watering Vietnamese dishes (veg and nonveg), amazing coffee, juices, and not so ok tea. I would definitely recommend this hotel.
reviews.response:
Dear Anderson,
Thank you for your kind review, we are glad you enjoyed your stay with us. 
We hope to welcome you back in the near future,
Best regards,
Hoianan Boutique Hotel Team

reviews.title: understanding what you pay for
reviews.text: first in all fairness to the hotel - i did get what i paid which by any australian standards is good cheap accomodation. The important points to look out for when booking at OnLine Hotel websites is that the picture put up by Agoda is not the same as what you will get when you arrive in Vietnam. Having said that too - given the low costs entry point and not being fussy - this is not a major issue but an important one as customers will see it as skirting the edges of false advertising. Perhaps it is best to put the correct picture of the room up to allay misinformation.

The location is great, close to the Old Town, night market, and the place to take a boat to make wishes. The staff are friendly and quickly address any issues that arise. However, make sure to book a room with windows facing the outside. I unknowingly booked a room with windows facing the hallway, and since there's no ventilation, it feels a bit damp and has a smell. When I mentioned the smell, they tried to resolve it with an air freshener. The shampoo, conditioner, and body wash are not great, so I think it would be better to bring your own. The bottled water provided by the hotel feels a bit sticky for some reason, so I ended up buying my own.

reviews.title: Came for 2 nights, stayed for 4
reviews.positives:
This hotel stay was the highlight of my 2-week trip to Vietnam. Amenities, decor, and staff were all top notch. I originally booked two nights and ended up extending the stay by two more nights because I loved it so much.  The hotel is elegant and cozy, and within a 5 min walk to the main area of Hoi An. The street in front of the hotel turns into a market every evening. The market wraps up promptly around 10PM so it wasn't noisy at night.

The hotel had a lot of recommendations for the area  including a really good list of restaurant recommendations. I also rented a scooter through the hotel and it was ready in 15 minutes.

Hotel management and staff went out of their way to make the guests feel welcome. Even the night guard wished me a safe onward journey by way of Google Translate when I was checking out. Also, a special thank you to Ms Ahn at reception for her incredible attention to detail and to the needs of hotel guests.
reviews.negatives: I stayed in three different rooms because the hotel was almost fully booked and I made changes on a short notice. The rooms all had identical decor but exact experience varied. The cheaper rooms face into the atrium and the room on the lower floor smelled moldy. The more expensive room facing the street was absolutely beautiful though.

reviews.title: My 3 nights at Hoiana Boutique Hotel
reviews.text:
Chosen this hotel because of the night market. Yes is indeed just infront. Very convenient. The breakfast is delicious and the aroma of the coffee here is excellent. All staff here is excellent esp Anh. She is very helpful, courteous and she also assisted in preparing food for breakfast. The nearby restaurant where we always frequented was at Ky's Market Restaurant where the food is good and the prices reasonable.
Though the hotel is small, surprising it has a swimming pool at the ground floor and an elevator too that is good for elderly.
So if you want to save your time walking to the Ancient Town within 5 mins, you can stay here.

reviews.title: Not a bad choice.
reviews.text:
It was right in front of the night market, but there was no noise and it was nice to be able to walk anywhere. Also, the bed was located just in front of the room door, and I thought there might be noise from guests passing in the hallway, but it was surprisingly quiet. However, it was disappointing to see a lot of dust piled up on the shelf at eye level in the room and that the facilities were old.

I didn't expect much from breakfast, but I was surprised by how delicious it was, and my parents said it was better than the restaurant they visited the day before. However, breakfast was available only from 6:30 AM, and when I went down around 6:45 AM, the hot food was being put out slowly, and it was very hot since the air conditioning wasn't turned on. It wasn't until after 7 AM that all the food was fully set up and the air conditioning was turned on. I noticed other guests seemed to be ordering pho from a staff member hidden in the kitchen. There were no signs anywhere about instant cooking.

Spacious and comfortable room. staff spoke excellent English and were super helpful with everything, including helping us book tours and buy tickets. The free bikes doesn't look fancy, but were very easy to ride since they were well maintained. Loved the breakfast. Bonus tip. Just a few blocks away is Madam Lau, the food was wonderful, we ate all of our remaining meals there after discovering it.

reviews.title: Friendly n helpful staff
reviews.text:
We only stay 1 night at this hotel, and when we checked in, around 11ish am, we asked the lovely receptionist - Anh, if she can refer any tour for kayaking. Then she recommended her frd who is having a company organising kayaking tour n watch for sunset. The whole journey is nice and relaxing, the guide is very friendly n speaks very good English, he told us a lot of story, and we ended the trip nearby the hotel which just a few mins walk from the hotel. Anh whatapp us during and end trip to ask us how’s the trip, and if we enjoy it.
On the next day when we waited for our driver to pick us up in the afternoon, we met Anh again, and she is so keen to ask if our trip is fine and she was happy to hear that we enjoy it so much. 

Referring to the hotel location, it is right on top of the night market, but it wasn’t that noisy n busy at all. If u r very sensitive on sound while sleep, they may not need to choose this hotel, becoz we still hear some noises from downstairs when all kiosks were closing.
And it is walking distance to the old town.

The hotel itself is descent, value for money. Hot water in the shower room is very powerful.

The only downside is the breakfast, limited choices and the honey melon has weird taste.  But there’re tons of cafe in the area, so no need to worry, u can go out to have sandwich and coffee.

Tuvimos un pequeño problema con la habitación y lo resolvieron de inmediato ofreciéndonos otra sin ningún inconveniente. Además, ponen muchas facilidades para alquilar motos y cuentan con servicio de bicicletas gratuito, lo que resulta muy cómodo para moverse por la zona. Una estancia muy recomendable por el servicio y la atención recibida.
reviews.negatives: Lo que menos me gustó fue el desayuno, ya que no era muy variado y, cuando se agotaba algún producto, no lo reponían incluso después de solicitarlo.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I came with my younger sibling and the location of the accommodation was really good; it was right in front of the street where the night market starts by the harbor, which was great for going out at night. The breakfast was just okay, and when I asked for the eggs to be made as an omelet and soft-boiled, they weren't seasoned. The staff members were kind and greeted us every time we went out, which was nice. The bedding had a few stains that didn't come out; my sibling and I have short hair, but we found some on the pillow. However, we didn't really mind that. For really sensitive individuals, the soundproofing isn't great near the hallway or windows, so you can hear noises. We used earplugs to sleep and had no issues. The curtains don’t block out light, so if you want to nap during the day, it's good to pull them down.

reviews.title: Cumple con lo prometido
reviews.positives:

La ubicación del hotel es perfecta  unos pocos metros del río, muy cerca de todos los puntos turísticos de Hoian. También comentar que el hotel está situado en una calle donde se monta parte del mercadillo nocturno de la ciudad, por lo que a partir de las 6 de la tarde hasta las 22 o 23 horas es imposible descansar con normalidad por el ruido del mercadillo, pero es justo el momento perfecto para salir del hotel y vivir el ambiente de la ciudad!
En cuanto a la habitación estaba muy bien, amplia, con dos camas grandes y con espacio suficiente para moverse y además contaba con un pequeño balcón con vistas a la calle. 
Contratamos servicio de transfer al aeropuerto con el hotel y fue muy bueno, puntual, incluso nos dieron la opción de adelantarlo poco antes de las salida por un cambio en el vuelo.
reviews.negatives: Las pocas opciones que había en el desayuno. Para la gente occidental solamente había unas tostadas y alguno bollería, el resto era comida vietnamita. En conjunto el desayuno tenia pocas opciones y se puede hacer pesado si se pasan varios días en el hotel.

Additionally, it might not be suitable for those who dislike bustling places; however, we liked it, so it was not a problem for us.

reviews.title: Charming Hotel with Awesome Staff
reviews.text:
Location is great because the tail end of the night market is right outside and the Old Town is just about 300m away. That's good cos it's not as noisy and crowded as the center of it all. A bit noisy at night but didn't bother us much. Lots of nearby restaurants. Grab is also accessible from this hotel.

Cleanliness is generally ok. Just need to inform the front desk in case housekeeping misses a thing or two and they'll take of it promptly.

Facilities are as posted. There's a pool but restaurant is only open for breakfast. Breakfast is basic and ok for the price we paid.  

The Hotel Staff is the real gem of this place. Everyone is just so helpful and warm. From the Hotel Security Guard who is just so helpful in assisting us to check in when we arrived late at night and had a cheerful smile for us whenever we pass him by,  to the front desk personnel, Thuy and Anh were just lovely helping us arrange tours and activities, to the kitchen staff prepping breakfast.  We'd visit this place again mostly because of the staff that's made our stay unforgettable

reviews.title: What is employee kindness?
reviews.text:
I used it as a place to stay for 0.5 nights before departure. I think I stayed for about a total of 2 hours. The unique room had a window facing the hallway, which made me feel a bit stuffy. I should have paid more for a room with a balcony; when I caught a glimpse during cleaning, the atmosphere looked really nice. Above all, the staff, whether the owner or not, were young, so communication was good. I was saved when I ran short of taxi fare and they quickly told me where to exchange money at night. If you can't have breakfast the next morning, you can request a packed lunch, and they will prepare it for you at checkout!

A night market opens right in front. It's a 5-minute cut to the place where the boat rides are. It's perfect for busy people. The downside is that when the night market opens, Grab can get a bit congested trying to get in. Also, the air conditioning feels a bit weak for three people, including one large person.

El hotel desayuno bien, puedes solicitar omelette y otras cosas directamente y el resto coger bufete, la habitación cómoda aunque al estar en la 3 planta el techo tenía bajante pero no era un problema, por poner una pega hubo una boda en un local próximo y de 12 a 16 el ruido de la música fue tremendo, lo mejor la atención del personal, repetiria

reviews.title: I stayed in two types of rooms.
reviews.text: The location is extremely convenient, but since we were coming from Danang via My Khe Beach to Hoi An for evening sightseeing after dinner, the tour bus couldn’t get in, and we had a lot of luggage, so we arranged for an electric cart with the guide to take us to the hotel. On the first night, since it was late, we got a room on the third floor with no windows or terrace, and the ceiling was low, so I bumped my head! There was no bathtub, and the shower water flows toward the toilet, so you need to use it carefully! On the second night, we had a luxurious room of about 45 square meters with a terrace and a bathtub (the jacuzzi was so nice that I took four baths in one night). I didn’t care much for the terrace since it was hot, but the suitcase fit under the bed, and there was plenty of storage, making it the best room. The staff was also very friendly. For breakfast, I didn't have high expectations and borrowed the hotel's free bicycles to get takeout from a famous banh mi place (there are three) and ordered an omelet at the hotel to eat. For some reason, the donuts were delicious. The hotel information said there was no elevator! So I was thinking about how much to tip while carrying heavy luggage, but there turned out to be a nice elevator that opened on both sides. Since our flight was late at night, we chartered a car from the hotel at 20:30 (350,000 dong, about 2,100 yen, which is cheap!). Before the car arrived, I was able to use the pool's shower and bath towels for free.

Nos dejaron usar el baño para ducharnos una vez ya realizado el check out, lo cual fue un alivio. También nos organizaron el transporte al aeropuerto en un coche muy amplio y cómodo y a buen precio. Mención especial a las chicas de recepción que son muy amables, hablan muy bien inglés y están siempre dispuestas a ayudar.

reviews.title: Far from the hubbub of the town
reviews.text:
We stayed at the Superior Deluxe Room for one night. 

The staff was very welcoming. She briefed us about the hotel, the places we wanted to visit, and the activities we might be interested in.  The hotel already negotiated with operators so guests can get lower prices.

We love the fact that the hotel has an elevator.

The room was spacious and we had no problem opening our luggage and placing them on the floor.

The room amenities were amazing. They even provided bathrobes! We felt like staying in a five-star hotel.

The breakfast was great. There were many choices of food. It is worth waking up early. 

It was quite far from the main canal and the nightly festivities. On the other hand, that is why we could have a good night's sleep. If we had stayed near the canal, the loud music from the cafes might have interfered with our rest.

reviews.title: Hermoso hotel en Hoi An!
reviews.positives: El alojamiento está muy, es muy limpio,ordenado, está súper bien ubicado(a metros del centro histórico y las atracciones principales, y además es justo en la calle donde se hace todas las noches el mercado nocturno, pero es muyyyyy tranquilo así que no hay ruidos molestos). El desayuno es súper completo y el personal es muy amable y te ayudan en todo. Mención especial para el guardia de seguridad que nos recibió cuando llegamos muy tarde en la madrugada y nos ayudó con todo!!! Volveríamos con gusto a hospedarnos en el hotel!!!

reviews.title: Highly Recommend
reviews.text: Hotel is in the heart of ancient town, walkable distant to many attractions and Cafes. Right downstairs is the night market and about 5 mins walk to the river for the boat ride and releasing lantern! Room is very spacious  and clean, water pressure is strong and especially love the jacuzzi bathtub.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:

Y el casco antiguo está muy muy cerca.
Además los trabajadores te ayudan en todo lo que pueden.

reviews.title: Great location and Friendly staff
reviews.text: It was a nice cosy hotel that is able to meet your basic needs but the service rendered is exceptional. Staff were friendly and a special shoutout to Anh who is very remarkably attentive, meticulous and helpful. She has helped to answered our queries and made constructive suggestions so that we can fully enjoy our experience at Hoi an.  You can book the coconut tour directly with the hotel and lantern boat back after watching the memories show. There’s a night market right outside the hotel and can be slightly noisy at times but after it’s closed you can enjoy the peacefulness. Walkable distance to major attractions and surrounded by good food too. Highly recommend to stay!

reviews.title: Gran experiencia en Hoi an
reviews.positives: El hotel tiene una estética preciosa, es muy agradable y el personal es encantador. El desayuno es fantástico, realmente está muy bien y tienes mucho para elegir. También puedes pedirles algo, si está en su mano ten por seguro que lo harán. Es un sitio increíble, la ciudad antigua también y el hotel está muy cerca. A la noche tienes el mercado nocturno en la misma puerta del hotel, lo que no es impedimento para dormir. Se duerme muy bien y tranquilo.
reviews.negatives: Nos toco una habitación oscura, en el primer piso. Lamentablemente, la luz artificial no mejoraba esta condición. Recomiendo al hotel que coloque luces lez, blancas para ganar más luz y subrayar el espacio que sí hay en la habitación. Porque con tal falta de luz se hace más pequeña de lo que realmente es.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Hotel bien placé sur la petite île en bordure du centre ville (5 min à pied). 
Marché nocturne dans la rue de l'hôtel (4pm-10pm), sympathique mais bruyant du coup jusqu'à 10pm.
Petit déjeuner correct.
Bémol sur le réveil en raison des annonces du gouvernement au micro à 6:50 am pendant 40 minutes.. c'était infernal mais peut être entendu dans toute ville et indépendant de l'hôtel.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Charmant hotel proche du centre historique de Hoi An. Chambre spacieuse avec balcon pou rma part.
Marché de nuit le weekend dans la rue devant l'hotel où nous avons pu déguster de la langouste grillée, expérience à ne pas louper.
Tout est accessible à pied en ville et si vous souhaitez aller à la plage, l'hotel vous prête des vélos.

reviews.title: Hoianan Boutique
reviews.text:
Great hotel, good value for the room type I booked with breakfast. Breakfast selection was minimal but all you need to start the day. Enough Asian and western selections. Very comfortable bed, bathroom had a modern design and great shower! Location very good just walkable to most of the centre and the main attractions, free bicycle which was great to have for a day to venture out of the town and see a bit more. 
Great modern hotel, helpful friendly staff, I would recommended and stay again .
reviews.response:
Dear Mr./Mrs. BREANDON,
Thank you for your kind review, we are happy that you chose to spend your holiday with us and we hope that you will come back and visit us again soon
Best regard,
Hoianan Boutique Hotel

reviews.title: Big clean rooms with great location
reviews.text: Stayed 3 nights , location right in the night market which starts 4pm daily . No noise issues at all . Room is spacious for 3 of us with toiletries all provides . Buffet breakfast was good enough for us too with hot station too . Staffs were all friendly and informative . Highly recommended if coming to Hoi An
